$comment: Example build config for d4-site-builder. Run: node bin/assemble.mjs --config this-file.json. Optional fields shown here: nav (base/tail item trees; items with children render as mega-menu panels, two levels of nesting max), announcement (bar above the header), quote (site-wide quote modal; enabled defaults to true), socialLinks (footer icons), darkMode (set false to disable the dark theme even when the palette has a dark variant), themeDark (dark palette for a custom `theme`; without it a custom theme ships light-only).
tagline: Precision metal fabrication for the Midwest.
description: Acme Fabrication delivers custom metal work for industrial clients across the region, from one-off prototypes to production runs.

base.label: Services
base.description: Custom fabrication services for industrial clients across the Midwest.

children.label: Production runs
children.description: Repeatable production with QA on every batch.
